name: Sids Transportation Svc

Yelp shows two SID'S TRANSPORTATION SERVICES locations in Katy: 640 S Mason Rd (active per Dec 2025 listing) and 23918 River Place Dr (matches source address, marked CLOSED as of Feb 2026). Likely small intrastate limo / non-emergency operator; LLC/Inc status not confirmed via TX SOS in this pass.

name: ATC Transport Inc
registry_source: BBB, TruckingUS, Yellow Pages (NC SOS direct lookup blocked)
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate). FMCSA SAFER search for *ATC TRANSPORT* lists carriers in FL, PA, NJ, TX, MI, BC, MN, MA - no NC entity. BBB file at 12101 Egglestone Dr Pineville NC 28134 opened 9/11/2015 (phone 704-540-4344, not BBB accredited). Other directory entries (TruckingUS, Yellow Pages) list 201 College St, Pineville, NC 28134, phone (704) 889-1389; categorized contract truck hauling; <$500K revenue, 1-4 employees. Source rank file lists 321 A S Poke St. NC SOS profile URL https://www.sosnc.gov/online_services/search/Business_Registration_profile/4832086 surfaced in search but returns 403 - direct sosnc.gov lookup needed for SOSID, formation date, officers.

name: TMD Transport

notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate). FMCSA SAFER search returns multiple *TMD TRANSPORT* entries (Alachua FL, Tucson AZ, Dandridge TN, St Paul MN, Winnfield LA, Coolidge AZ x2, Kissimmee FL), no Columbia SC. Only SC TMD-named record is TMD FAMILY ENTERPRISES LLC (USDOT 4432756) in Ridgeville, SC - ~30mi from Columbia, different address than 2601 Read St. Bizapedia direct match for TMD Transport Columbia SC not found. SC SOS bizfile search (businessfilings.sc.gov) requires CAPTCHA and was not directly retrievable.

name: Cardinal Care Transportation
registry_source: NH Secretary of State (not directly retrieved); NH Company Registry surfaces related names
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate). FMCSA SAFER returns 'no records matching CARDINAL CARE TRANSPORTATION'; broader search for CARDINAL CARE also returns no records. Address 572 Hanover St, Manchester, NH 03104 is residential/small-commercial; no directory listing matches the exact business name in NH. NH Company Registry index lists CARDINAL COMMUNITY CARE LLC and CARDINAL CAR CARE LLC but no Cardinal Care Transportation - direct NH SOS quickstart.sos.nh.gov lookup recommended. Likely a very small intrastate NEMT/livery operator or DBA.
